text.title: Experimentation at Scale Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Traffic + reversibility permit a 4-week experiment with measurable MDE?

conclusion.verdict: use qualitative methods or before/after analysis
experiment is the wrong instrument; use risk review
author hypothesis with primary + secondary + guardrails + MDE

text.example: experiment_feasible=true -> irreversible=false -> platform_present=true -> pre-register hypothesis (rule hypothesis-pre-registered).
